$description: Single machine-readable design-token source for Jovie System B (JOV #12009 wave 1). Values are seeded verbatim from the live canonical definitions in styles/design-system.css and public/pitch/colors_and_type.css (gray scale) — this file changes NOTHING visually; it makes the canonical values machine-readable. Compile with: pnpm --filter @jovie/web run tokens:build. Generated outputs: styles/generated/design-tokens.css, lib/design/generated/design-tokens.ts, lib/design/generated/design-tokens.manifest.json. Do not edit generated files by hand.

gray.$description: Canonical 12-step gray scale documented in DESIGN.md. Previously defined only in public/pitch/colors_and_type.css, so var(--grayN) did not resolve in the app — the generated CSS fixes that.

accent.$description: System B accent palette rotation. Light values from :root, dark values from .dark in styles/design-system.css. These entries are the canonical statement for divergence checks; design-system.css remains the live emitter until the namespace-collapse wave.

interactive.$description: Interactive accent (focus, links, active). Canonical Jovie DS #7170ff, decoupled from the purple feature accent.

duration.$description: Motion durations (styles/linear-tokens.css --linear-duration-*). Recorded here as the canonical values; the --linear-* aliases are deprecated and shrink-only ratcheted.

divergences.$description: Known same-concept/different-value pairs across legacy namespaces, tracked for the namespace-collapse wave. Do NOT silently unify these — each is a visual change requiring its own migration slice.

accent-blue.note: --color-accent-blue (dark carbon palette) vs --linear-accent-blue (System A marketing). Unification tracked under the namespace-collapse wave of #12009.
